ideas.name: Korean Slang Translator
ideas.core_pain: Difficulty understanding Korean internet slang and nuances
ideas.one_liner: Instantly translate Korean text into plain English and explain the nuance
ideas.monetization: Affiliate links to language apps or display ads
mvp: Static HTML page with client-side JS
ideas.2w_test: Build a simple HTML form, post 5 videos demonstrating the tool

ideas.name: Korean Drama Plot Twist Generator
ideas.core_pain: Bored with current plotlines and tropes
ideas.one_liner: Generate hilarious, absurd plot twists for your favorite K-dramas
mvp: Static HTML page with JS logic
risks: Content may not be funny enough
ideas.2w_test: Write 20 twists, record 5 videos reading them out

ideas.name: Korean 'Hanok' Style AI Art Generator
ideas.core_pain: Hard to visualize Hanok interior designs
ideas.one_liner: Generate realistic Hanok interior designs using AI
mvp: Web app using free AI API (no backend)
ideas.2w_test: Create 10 videos showing the generation process

ideas.name: Gyeonggi Food Map
ideas.core_pain: Don't know where to eat cheap and good in Gyeonggi
ideas.one_liner: Curated list of the best cheap eats in Gyeonggi province
ideas.monetization: Affiliate links to Naver Maps/Google Maps
ideas.2w_test: Find 10 places, make 5 videos showing the food

ideas.name: Korean 'N-gram' Word Cloud Generator
ideas.core_pain: Visualizing word frequency in Korean text
ideas.one_liner: Create word clouds from any Korean text instantly
ideas.2w_test: Build the tool, post 3 videos showing the visual output

ideas.name: Korean Job Interview Simulator
ideas.core_pain: Nervous about answering common interview questions
ideas.one_liner: Common interview questions and 'bad' vs 'good' answers
ideas.monetization: E-book of answers or paid course
mvp: Static HTML page with Q&A list
ideas.2w_test: Write 10 Q&As, record 5 videos explaining the answers
